problem id: d623e937
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(4) AND NOT SHR(3)) XOR NOT SHL(7)

examples:
  11100101 -> 00111101
  10001000 -> 01110111
  10100001 -> 01110101
  11111000 -> 01111111
  01101010 -> 01011101
  00110101 -> 00101110
  01101111 -> 10001101
  10001110 -> 00010111
  00100111 -> 00001101

query: 10000011
predicted answer: 01010111
